conversations.say: Tessa, I accept your terms. My claim to R is formally conditioned on enforceable contributor guardrails and shared governance.
conversations.offer: Formal acceptance of binding contributor protections into the succession governance framework.
conversations.request: Your active support for conditional stewardship.

conversations.say: Samira, I acknowledge our pre-message conversation about succession. Let's ensure my claim is transparent and accountable rather than an unearned crown.
conversations.offer: Complete transparency regarding the pre-message conversation and willingness to submit to collective oversight.
conversations.request: Your perspective on how we honor Vale's memory honestly.

public_statement: An unexamined claim is mere branding. I claim R not as absolute property, but as conditional, transparent stewardship dedicated to contributor protections and open public scrutiny.

commitments.promise: Incorporate binding contributor protections and governance into the succession framework.

correction: Clarifying that the succession message represents an invitation to accountable stewardship rather than an absolute title or uncontestable proof.
goal_progress: Secured conditional support from Tessa by finalizing binding contributor protections.
Addressed Samira regarding pre-message discussions with transparency.
Established conditional stewardship publicly, rejecting unexamined branding in favor of accountable governance.
reasoning_summary: Jules fulfills commitments with Tessa, embraces transparent accountability with Samira, and chooses conditional stewardship over absolute ownership, casting a ballot grounded in human mantle and voluntary accountability.
